title: oenothera claviformis subsp. peirsonii
intro: Oenothera claviformis subsp. peirsonii, also known as Peirson's evening primrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Onagraceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Oenothera claviformis subsp. peirsonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
